chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-385 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of CMA 3025/2022 19-01-2024 None present for the applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
